calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorneys Fees
Off Calendar Oct-11-2019 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

RULING: There being no appearance or objection, the tentative ruling is adopted on REAL PARTY IN INTEREST FRIENDS OF THE WILLOW GLEN TRESTLE's Motion For Attorneys Fees, as follows:

Real Party in Interest Friends of the Willow Glen Trestle's motion for an award of attorney's fees under Code of Civil Procedure section 1021.5 is denied.

The Court signed the order submitted by email. (See word minutes and scanned order for the Court's full ruling.)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

MOTION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE Notice Of Motion And Motion Of City Of San Jose In Support Of Petition For Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Mar-07-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Margo Laskowska, esq. (408-535-1965) Office of the City Attorney for Plaintiff City of San Jose.
Shari B. Posner, esq. (510-879-0856) Office of the Attorney General for Defendants State Historical Resources Commission, et al.
Susan Brandt-Hawley, esq. (707-938-3900) for Real Party in Interest Friends of the Willow Glen Trestle.

The Court makes disclosure he is acquainted with Ms. Brandt-Hawley through a professional organization to which they are both members, that will not affect his ability to fairly and impartially decide on this matter.

RULING - A R G U E D. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument generally adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Motion Of City Of San Jose In Support Of Petition For Writ Of Mandate

Petitioner City of San Jose's petition for writ of mandate is granted; reserving form of relief until supplemental brief are filed. All parties are to file by 3/21/19 supplemental briefs addressing the questions of the appropriate remedy and form of relief to be granted by the court, and separately lodge proposed order/writ. Defendant and Real Party in Interest may submit a joint single brief. (see word minutes for full details) (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript).

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)
